tasks.prompt: Abra https://www.npmjs.com/package/typescript e retorne o título da página, URL final e 3 dados visíveis na interface web. Não use npm view nem endpoints do registry.npmjs.org.
bashCommands:
python - <<'PY'
import requests, re, json
url='https://www.npmjs.com/package/typescript'
r=requests.get(url, allow_redirects=True, timeout=20)
print('FINAL', r.url)
print('STATUS', r.status_code)
text=r.text
m=re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', text, re.I|re.S)
print('TITLE', m.group(1).strip() if m else 'N/A')
print('LEN', len(text))
# show snippets with likely visible data
for pat in [r'"name":"typescript"', r'"version":"([^"]+)"', r'weekly downloads', r'License', r'homepage']:
    mm=re.search(pat, text, re.I)
    print(pat, '->', bool(mm), mm.group(1) if mm and mm.lastindex else '')
print(text[:500])
PY

python - <<'PY'
import urllib.request, re
url='https://www.npmjs.com/package/typescript'
req=urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'})
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as r:
    final=r.geturl(); data=r.read().decode('utf-8','ignore')
print('FINAL', final)
m=re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', data, re.I|re.S)
print('TITLE', m.group(1).strip() if m else 'N/A')
print('LEN', len(data))
for s in ['__NEXT_DATA__','weekly downloads','License','typescript']:
    print(s, s in data)
print(data[:400])
PY
where chrome || where chromium || where msedge
curl -L "https://r.jina.ai/http://https://www.npmjs.com/package/typescript" | grep -n "### \|Weekly Downloads\|License\|Unpacked Size\|Total Files\|Version\|Last publish" | head -n 30
